meta.description: Per-user OAuth2 access to Google Drive (read-only). Self-registers an OAuth callback endpoint.

manifest.title: Google Workspace
manifest.author: Adam Smith
manifest.description: Per-user OAuth2 access to Google Drive (read-only). Self-registers an OAuth callback endpoint.

specs.name: _authed
specs.description:
Common preamble: ensure routes, resolve token.
Returns (app, user_id, token_or_none).

specs.name: _setup
specs.description: Lazy route registration, called once per tool invocation.

specs.name: connect_google_workspace
specs.description:
Connect the user's Google account to enable Drive access.
Call this when a user wants to link Google Workspace or when another
tool method reports NOT_CONNECTED.

specs.name: disconnect_google_workspace
specs.description: Disconnect the user's Google account. Revokes tokens.

specs.name: list_drive_folder
specs.description: List files in a Google Drive folder.

folder_id.description: Folder ID, or 'root' for the top level (default: root)

specs.name: read_drive_file
specs.description: Read a Google Drive file by ID. Exports Docs as markdown, Sheets as CSV, Slides as text.

file_id.description: The file ID (from search results or a Drive URL)

specs.name: search_drive
specs.description: Search the user's Google Drive for files matching a text query.
